safety_warnings.text: To be installed by a heating engineer only.

source_refs.source_quote: [en] To be installed by a heating engineer only.

safety_warnings.text: Observe the instruction manuals for both the device and any accessories used.

source_refs.source_quote: [en] Observe the instruction manuals for both the device and any accessories used.

safety_warnings.text: Before carrying out electrical work: disconnect the installation from the power supply.

source_refs.source_quote: [en] Before carrying out electrical work: disconnect the installation from the power supply.

source_refs.section_title: Check alle connections for leakage / vérifier l'étanchéité des tous les raccords
source_refs.source_quote: 7. Check all connections for leakage. / Contrôler l'étanchéité de tous les raccords.

extraction_notes: Flue length tables are complex and have been extracted with a confidence of 0.8 and review_required set to true for each entry to ensure accuracy across all conditions (altitude, number of boilers, kW, diameter).
No fault codes, diagnostic codes, or status codes were extracted. Manual should be reviewed or reprocessed.
